New Tianshi (Nanjing) Optoelectronic Technology Co., Ltd. presents a severe anomaly: despite being officially tagged as a 'Large' manufacturing enterprise with a fully paid-in capital of 62 million RMB, it reported 0 insured employees in 2024. A critical clue lies in its registered address: 'Room B-203... Comprehensive Bonded Zone'. Bonded zones are special customs areas designed for tax-exempt import/export processing, not typically for massive standalone manufacturing if confined to a specific 'Room'. This Sino-foreign joint venture likely ceased its physical manufacturing of 'DRCP reflective polarizing films' (a highly specialized LCD component) and currently functions purely as a dormant holding shell or a specialized logistics/financial routing node within the bonded zone to handle the import/export of optical raw materials for its parent entities.
